prestazioni: Full bolt-on turbo system for the S55B30T0 (3.0L twin-turbo inline-6) featuring a Precision Turbo PT6266 CEA turbocharger with billet compressor wheel, 62mm inducer, and 66mm exducer, paired with a custom 3.5-inch titanium downpipe (VRSF Euro 2 catted) and a CSF dual-core intercooler with 4.5L capacity for sustained 650whp on E85

MCS 2-way adjustable remote-reservoir coilovers with 800lb/in front springs and 900lb/in rear springs, paired with Ohlins TTX40 adjustable dampers and spherical bearing top mounts (034 Motorsport) for sub-200ms damper response, optimized for Nürburgring lap times under 7:50

Full Motec M150 ECU standalone conversion with individual cylinder fuel control, 4-bar MAP sensors, and a custom flex-fuel ethanol sensor (Continental), enabling 28psi boost on E60 blend with a 93-octane base map, paired with a Drexler Motorsport limited-slip differential with 45% preload and carbon fiber clutch plates (Sachs Performance)
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit with 30mm front and 40mm rear fender flares, paired with a custom carbon fiber front splitter (Vorsteiner GT3-style) and a 3D-printed ABS rear diffuser (3D Carbon) with integrated Gurney flaps for -120kg of downforce at 200km/h

Full carbon fiber roof replacement (AC Schnitzer) with integrated Gintani carbon fiber mirror caps, paired with a custom matte Nardo Grey (BMW Individual code A96) vinyl wrap with 3M 2080-G12 gloss black accents on the kidney grilles and rear diffuser

OEM+ M Performance carbon fiber rear spoiler (BMW part #51-71-2-445-833) with a custom 3D-printed aluminum gurney flap (15mm height), paired with a custom titanium exhaust system (REMUS Valvetronic) featuring 80mm carbon fiber tips and a secondary butterfly valve for active sound modulation
